name: Fresh Pear with Roquefort Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a wooden spoon, mash the Roquefort cheese and heavy cream together until well blended.
2. Add the dry white wine and cayenne pepper to the mixture and blend until smooth.
3. Cut each pear in half lengthwise and remove the core.
4. Rub the cut sides of each pear with the lemon to prevent discoloration.
5. Spoon about one-third of the cheese mixture into the center hollow of each pear.
6. Serve slightly chilled.
Note: Technically, this is a savory dish. It makes an elegant appetizer.
